channel.title: Sprint 7: WordPress comments package released
channel.description:
# Sprint 7 planning This sprint will go from the 2nd September to the 30th September. This is going to be our focus, in this order: * Finish all the features that are currently in progress: New action to post comments and `@frontity/yoast` package. * Develop a functional version of the preview. * [Support for custom headers in Source packages](https://community.frontity.org/t/support-for-custom-headers-in-source-packages/2678), which is directly related to the preview. * Develop the [SmartAds package](https://community.frontity.org/t/smart-adserver/1586). * [TypeScript 3.9 breaks `@frontity/source` types](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/452).
Apart from this, we'll do the research of the [Server Extensibility](https://community.frontity.org/t/server-extensibility/2810) during this sprint.
**Included in the sprint** :
* All the issues that were in progress in the Sprint 6. * Research of the [Server Extensibility](https://community.frontity.org/t/server-extensibility/2810). * Finish what is left to have a functional preview: * [Finish the PHP plugin for the embedded mode and the preview.](https://github.com/frontity/frontity-embedded-proof-of-concept/issues/2) * [Add e2e for the preview](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/562). * [Support for custom headers in Source packages](https://community.frontity.org/t/support-for-custom-headers-in-source-packages/2678), which is directly related to the preview. * [Smart AdServer package](https://community.frontity.org/t/smart-adserver/1586). * [TypeScript 3.9 breaks `@frontity/source` types [8pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/452).
**Backlog:**
* [AMP beta version](https://community.frontity.org/t/amp-package/388). * Research of the [Frontity Hooks](https://community.frontity.org/t/frontity-hooks/2811).
You can keep track of the process at the [Sprint board](https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/9).
---
# Sprint 7 Review
For a more detailed view of the final status of the sprint you can check the [GitHub board ](https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/9).
**Released**
* Finish the [WordPress comments package](https://community.frontity.org/t/wordpress-comments-package/1267/89) with a new action to post comments. * New `@frontity/yoast` package to support the [Yoast REST API fields](https://community.frontity.org/t/support-for-yoast-plugin-rest-api-fields/2626). * Develop a functional version of the [WordPress preview](https://community.frontity.org/t/wordpress-preview-support/2419). * [Support for custom headers in Source packages](https://community.frontity.org/t/support-for-custom-headers-in-source-packages/2678), which is directly related to the preview. * Fix the bug " URL class imported from `frontity` throws an error in Safari 13.1.2" - [#565](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/565)
**In progress** * Development of the [Smart AdServer package](https://community.frontity.org/t/smart-adserver/1586). * [TypeScript 3.9 breaks `@frontity/source` types [8pt]](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/452).
**Not started** * Research of the [Server Extensibility](https://community.frontity.org/t/server-extensibility/2810).

item.title: Sprint 7: WordPress comments package released
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Oh! My bad, now I understand it

Read full topic

item.title: Sprint 7: WordPress comments package released
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
We released it after the sprint planning that we had two weeks ago so it’d part of the Sprint 8. As I was on holidays I didn’t have time to write this topic before, but I wanted to do it anyways although it was late.

Read full topic

item.title: Sprint 7: WordPress comments package released
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Hey @SantosGuillamot didn’t we released the Smart Ads package last week? It also appears as released in the Feature discussion. Can you clarify?

Read full topic

item.title: Sprint 7: WordPress comments package released
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Sprint 7 planning

This sprint will go from the 2nd September to the 30th September. This is going to be our focus, in this order:

  • Finish all the features that are currently in progress: New action to post comments and @frontity/yoast package.
  • Develop a functional version of the preview.
  • Support for custom headers in Source packages, which is directly related to the preview.
  • Develop the SmartAds package.
  • TypeScript 3.9 breaks @frontity/source types.

Apart from this, we’ll do the research of the Server Extensibility during this sprint.

Included in the sprint :

  • All the issues that were in progress in the Sprint 6.
  • Research of the Server Extensibility.
  • Finish what is left to have a functional preview:
    • Finish the PHP plugin for the embedded mode and the preview.
    • Add e2e for the preview.
  • Support for custom headers in Source packages, which is directly related to the preview.
  • Smart AdServer package.
  • TypeScript 3.9 breaks @frontity/source types [8pt].

Backlog:

  • AMP beta version.
  • Research of the Frontity Hooks.

You can keep track of the process at the Sprint board.

Sprint 7 Review

For a more detailed view of the final status of the sprint you can check the GitHub board .

Released

  • Finish the WordPress comments package with a new action to post comments.
  • New @frontity/yoast package to support the Yoast REST API fields.
  • Develop a functional version of the WordPress preview.
  • Support for custom headers in Source packages, which is directly related to the preview.
  • Fix the bug " URL class imported from frontity throws an error in Safari 13.1.2" - #565

In progress

  • Development of the Smart AdServer package.
  • TypeScript 3.9 breaks @frontity/source types [8pt].

Not started

  • Research of the Server Extensibility.

Read full topic
